info.name: Options Method Enabled
author: pdteam
info.description: OPTIONS method is enabled on the remote web server. OPTIONS method allows the client to determine the options and/or requirements associated with a resource.

request:
OPTIONS / HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:3000
User-Agent: Nuclei - Open-source project (github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei)
response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Allow: GET,HEAD,PUT,PATCH,POST,DELETE
Content-Length: 0
Date: Thu, 09 Apr 2026 18:00:00 GMT

info.name: Exposed .gitignore File
author: pdteam
info.description: A .gitignore file was exposed publicly. This file is used by git to specify which files to ignore in a project. Exposure may reveal internal directory structure and sensitive file locations.

info.name: CORS Misconfiguration
author: pdteam
bohops
info.description: A CORS misconfiguration was detected. The server allows any origin to access its resources, which could lead to cross-origin data leakage.

request:
GET /rest/user/login HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:3000
Origin: https://evil.com
response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://evil.com
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true

{}

info.name: JWT None Algorithm Vulnerability
author: pdteam
info.description: The server accepts a JWT token with the 'none' algorithm, which means the signature is not verified and an attacker can forge tokens.

request:
GET /rest/user/whoami HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:3000
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJub25lIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJkYXRhIjp7ImlkIjoxLCJlbWFpbCI6ImFkbWluQGp1aWNlLXNoLm9wIn19.
